reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, más de media hora para cargar combustible porque había llegado un camión para abastecer combustible y los 4 playeros no hacían más que dar vueltas sin importar las demoras que ocasionaron. por otro lado no tenían sistema para carga de puntos ni para cobrar con App o tarjeta

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. It took over half an hour to fill up because a tanker truck had arrived to deliver fuel, and the four attendants just kept circling around, oblivious to the delays they were causing. Furthermore, they didn't have a system for adding points to your card or accepting payments via app or card.

reviews.comment:
Sólo rescato a los playeros!!!
Ayer domingo, oooh casualidad aumento de nafta "no tenían sistema", ni ticket, ni serviclub, ni NADA q deje rastro o registro de venta!!!
Disfraz de evasión???
Cómo hacen después para contabilizar la venta etc, supuestamente los surtidores están directamente conectados con el sistema, inmediatamente en momentos normales genera factura!!
Una ESTAFA SEÑORES!!!
ASÍ ESTAMOS, Y NOS SIGUEN ENGAÑANDO POR TODOS LADOS...

(Translated by Google)
I only have praise for the gas station attendants!!!
Yesterday, Sunday, oh what a coincidence, gas prices went up and "the system was down," no receipts, no loyalty program, NOTHING that leaves a trace or sales record!!! Is this a cover-up for tax evasion???
How do they account for the sales afterward, etc.? Supposedly the pumps are directly connected to the system, and under normal circumstances, they generate an invoice immediately!!
It's a SCAM, PEOPLE!!!
THIS IS HOW WE ARE, AND THEY KEEP FOOLING US FROM EVERY SIDE...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtMVpXOTlRRRAB
